plugins.name: backend-review
plugins.description: Reviews backend code for security vulnerabilities and compliance issues (OWASP Top 10, injection, auth, PII, secrets).

plugins.name: debugging
plugins.description: Structured debugging and troubleshooting skill — observe, hypothesize, isolate, fix, verify.

plugins.name: docx
plugins.description: Create, read, edit, and manipulate Word documents (.docx) using docx-js and OOXML.

plugins.name: memory
plugins.description: Consolidates and organizes memory files at end of session.

plugins.name: pr-description
plugins.description: Generates clear, structured GitHub Pull Request descriptions.

plugins.name: pr-review
plugins.description: Thorough PR code reviews covering correctness, readability, architecture, testing, performance, and security.

plugins.name: git-stacked-prs
plugins.description: Split uncommitted or working-branch changes into stacked git branches for easier PR review.
